_meta.description: Post-call automation for voice-demo. Triggers on Supabase calls UPDATE, sends WhatsApp summary via Twilio, logs to Google Sheets, syncs qualified leads to GoHighLevel.

name: Voice Demo — Post-Call Automation

nodes.name: Supabase Trigger
nodes.notes: Configure Supabase DB Webhook: Table=calls, Events=UPDATE, Filter: ended_at IS NOT NULL AND notified_at IS NULL. Point to this n8n webhook URL.

nodes.name: Twilio WhatsApp — Notify Raphael
nodes.notes: Sends post-call summary to Raphael via WhatsApp. Requires Twilio credentials with WhatsApp enabled.

nodes.name: Google Sheets — Append Row
nodes.notes: Appends one row per call to 'Voice Demo Calls' sheet. Create sheet with headers: Date | Caller | Language | Duration (s) | Intent | Summary

nodes.name: IF — Qualified or Booked
nodes.notes: Only proceed to CRM if there is a qualified lead or booking.

nodes.name: GoHighLevel — Create/Update Contact
nodes.notes: Creates or updates a GHL contact. Replace YOUR_GHL_API_KEY and YOUR_GHL_LOCATION_ID. GHL API: https://highlevel.stoplight.io/docs/integrations

nodes.name: Supabase — Mark Notified
nodes.notes: Updates notified_at to prevent reprocessing. Uses Supabase REST API with service_role key.

setup_checklist: 1. Import this JSON into n8n (Workflows > Import)
2. Configure Twilio credentials in n8n (Credentials > Twilio API)
3. Configure Google Sheets OAuth2 in n8n
4. Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID with actual sheet ID from URL
5. Replace YOUR_GHL_API_KEY and YOUR_GHL_LOCATION_ID with GoHighLevel credentials
6. In Supabase: Database > Webhooks > Create Webhook on table 'calls', event UPDATE, pointing to this n8n webhook URL
8. Make a test call and verify: WhatsApp received, row in Google Sheets, GHL contact created
